scripts.install:apps: npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/life-tracker && npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/dev-notes && npm install --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/dev-action-hub && npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/study-planner && npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/cornell-notes && npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/coding-log && npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/school-meal && npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/mock-invest && npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefix apps/action-notifier
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --prefix apps/life-tracker && npm run build --prefix apps/dev-notes && npm run build --prefix apps/dev-action-hub && npm run build --prefix apps/study-planner && npm run build --prefix apps/cornell-notes && npm run build --prefix apps/coding-log && npm run build --prefix apps/school-meal && npm run build --prefix apps/mock-invest && npm run build --prefix apps/action-notifier
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:apps
